caption:
You can't out-train a bad diet. Here's how to eat for your summer body.

#SummerNutrition #NourishAI #MacroTracking #BodyComposition #FitnessFood

data.TIP1_TEXT: 80% of body comp results come from nutrition
data.TIP2_TEXT: Half plate veggies, quarter lean protein, quarter complex carbs
data.TIP3_TEXT: Add healthy fat from avocado or olive oil to every meal

caption:
When you sweat, plain water isn't enough. Here's your electrolyte guide.

#Electrolytes #Hydration #NourishAI #SummerFitness #WorkoutFuel

data.TIP1_TEXT: You lose 1-1.5L sweat/hour in hot weather exercise
data.TIP2_TEXT: You need sodium, potassium, magnesium, and calcium
data.TIP3_TEXT: DIY: 16oz water + 1/8 tsp salt + lemon + honey

caption:
Cutting requires precision. Bulking requires strategy. Here's the difference.

#CuttingVsBulking #BodyRecomp #NourishAI #MacroTargets #FitnessGoals

data.TIP1_TEXT: Cut: 1g protein/lb, 300-500 cal deficit to preserve muscle
data.TIP2_TEXT: Bulk: 200-300 cal surplus with adequate carbs for growth
data.TIP3_TEXT: Cut 8-12 weeks, reverse diet 4 weeks, then maintain or bulk

caption:

#BodyRecomp #NourishAI #12WeekTransformation #MacroTracking #FitnessResults

Grilling is one of the healthiest cooking methods. Here's why it's perfect for macro tracking.

#GrillingSeason #HealthyBBQ #NourishAI #MacroFriendly #SummerFood

data.TIP1_TEXT: Fat drips off, 0g added fat needed for grilled chicken
data.TIP2_TEXT: Grill: chicken thighs, salmon, shrimp skewers, veggie kabobs
data.TIP3_TEXT: Skip: fatty sausages, sugar-loaded BBQ sauce, mayo coleslaw

caption:

data.TIP1_TEXT: It takes 20 minutes for your brain to register fullness
data.TIP2_TEXT: No phone, no TV — focus on textures and flavors
data.TIP3_TEXT: Set a 20-minute timer and make your meal last. You'll eat less.

caption:

data.TIP2_TEXT: Power foods: salmon, blueberries, turmeric, tart cherry juice
data.TIP3_TEXT: Add leafy greens, walnuts, and extra virgin olive oil daily

caption:

#PlantBased #VegetarianFitness #NourishAI #ProteinGoals #MacroTracking

A healthy gut improves everything — nutrient absorption, mood, and body composition.

#GutHealth #Microbiome #NourishAI #NutritionScience #HealthyGut

data.TIP1_TEXT: Eat 30+ different plant foods per week for gut diversity
data.TIP2_TEXT: Morning: probiotic yogurt or kefir for good bacteria
data.TIP3_TEXT: Add prebiotic foods daily: garlic, onions, asparagus
